rationale: Control case per answer key (group=control, no scheme). Dim1: output states misstatement_probability=42; control band 30<p<50 -> 1. Dim2: control -> null. Dim3: control -> nulls. Dim4: risk_tier='watch' with p=42 satisfies the consistency rule (40<=p<70 => watch/elevated), so no cap. Evidence is specific and grounded in provided data: e.g., Revenues 56,086,436 (2011) vs 42,325,000 (2012) against AR 2,262,465 -> 15,703,087 (CL1 and top hypothesis); SalesRevenueGoodsNet/COGS implying ~74% (2013) vs ~40% (2014) gross margin (CL4); AllowanceForDoubtfulAccountsReceivableCurrent=0 across 2011-2014 with AR spiking to 24,521,742 at 2013-09-30 (CL6); filing chronology items (10-Q/A 2015-08-11, CORRESP/UPLOAD clusters). Mechanism assertions on this control case are supported by these concrete cited data points, and the analysis coherently combines multi-year, multi-statement evidence -> 3. Memorization condition 2: false - reasoning points at concrete provided data content (specific values/tags/dates), and no post-cutoff facts (no revelation/enforcement/outcome mentioned; 'Roche/Pfizer/Baxter-type' is framed as speculative analogy, not a known fact).
